title: HybridCompat
description: Improve compatibility between plugins and mods for Hybrid Server.
body:
# HybridCompat **Improve compatibility between plugins and mods for Hybrid Server.** **You should put HybridCompat-Bukkit into plugins folder, as well as put HybridCompat-Forge into mods Folder on server side. And client should also install the HybridCompat-Forge mod, or else some messages will just display key value.**
**Support MC1.16.5 for CatServer & Mohist.** ### AoA3 Patches(1.16.5-3.6.11) **Player has destroy permission in Residence can ignore.** - Fixed LightSpark/SoulSpark blaster can kill entity in Residence - Fixed NatureStaff can apply bonemeal to growable block in Residence - Fixed StrikerStaff can summon lightning in Residence - Fixed CoralStaff/SkydriverBow can place block in Residence - Fixed FungalStaff, MushroomSpores and more items can convert blocks in Residence ### Apotheosis Patches(1.16.5-4.8.9A0) **Player has destroy permission in Residence can ignore.** - Fixed ExplosiveArrow was effective in Residence
